case_title: GOOD HARVEY VS QUAYLE MARKY DBA QUAYLE AWNING CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,767.00 FILED BY GOOD HARVEY AS TO DEFENDANT QUAYLE MARKY DBA QUAYLE AWNING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOOD HARVEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUAYLE MARKY DBA QUAYLE AWNING CO. $1,767.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
